subject: Inquiry: Custom E-commerce Storefront & Mobile App
body:
Hi Sales Team,

We are looking to build a custom storefront for our fashion brand. We want to migrate our backend database to Shopify, but we need a highly customized frontend (Next.js) for SEO, custom visual layouts, and sub-second loading speeds, along with a cross-platform iOS & Android app built using React Native.

We will need user profiles, product search, cart, checkout with Stripe, and direct integration with our Salesforce CRM to sync order records.

Our budget is around $75k to $90k, and we hope to launch this in 4 months.

Looking forward to hearing from you and receiving a proposal.

Best,

Sarah Jenkins
Director of Technology, SwiftStyles Retail

subject: Infrastructure Migration & Security Compliance Inquiry
body:
Hello,

PayGuard is a fintech startup. We are currently hosting our apps on local VMs and want to migrate everything to a secure AWS cloud infrastructure using Kubernetes (EKS) and Terraform. Security is a massive concern for us as we need to comply with SOC2 requirements.

We also need a fully automated CI/CD pipeline (preferably GitHub Actions) and a Prometheus/Grafana monitoring stack to alert us of any container issues.

We want to complete this migration in 2-3 months. Budget is roughly $45k-$55k.

Can you send a proposal outlining your approach, timeline, and estimated resource pricing?

Thanks,

Marcus Chen
CTO, PayGuard Fintech

subject: Request for Proposal: Fleet Monitoring and Telematics Dashboard
body:
Hi,

GlobeLink operates a fleet of 500+ delivery trucks. We want to build a real-time IoT tracking platform that ingests GPS/telemetry data via MQTT, displays it on an interactive map using React/Leaflet, and alerts dispatchers when drivers go off-route.

We need a dashboard for dispatchers, SMS/email alert triggers for geofencing, and weekly analytics reports on driver idle times and route efficiency.

We expect a timeline of 5 months. Our budget is open but we'd like to see a detailed pricing breakdown.

Could you share if you've done something similar and provide a draft proposal?

Sincerely,

Daniel Kovacs
VP of Operations, GlobeLink Logistics
